systemStatus.detail: (1) Toast May 13 DPS not yet sent at run time (typically arrives ~7:38 AM PT). May 12 DPS arrived May 13 7:39 AM PT but Gmail MCP get_thread returns no parseable body — Net/Gross/Guests/Orders/Labor% require manual check in Toast app. (2) Sling May 14 daily report received at 7:01 AM PT: 8 scheduled employees, 0 off, 8 shifts, 0 uncovered, 38.74 hours, 0 OT. Staff: Rafael Patricio (Cook), Tony Rincon (Bartender), Christine Vargas (Bartender), Harmony Willson (Bartender), Noel Nunez (Chef), Bri Kelley (Server), James Hernadez (Server), Cal Carter (Busser). (3) Reviews backlog: 6 unanswered (data not refreshed this run — reviews scan not in scope of 7 AM job). Deimos Somied 5★ (Google, May 10) now 4 days old. Lisa O'Brien now 33 days old. (4) Google Ads May 13 live scrape: $22.23 spend, 97 clicks, 6,699 impressions, 1.45% CTR, $0.23 CPC, 0 conversions, target CPA $25.06, opt score 85%. Local store visits PMax limited by budget ($23.37/day cap); Oldest SB Brewery on Tap still paused. (5) Yelp last 30d: 56k ad impressions (88% ad share of 63.7k), 787 page visits from ads (75% of 1.1k), 186 leads from ads (79% of 234 total), 703 ad clicks. Billing period (May 1-13) spend $373.35, avg CPC $1.15, avg CPL $3.97. 12mo: 785 ad leads / 759 organic / 1,544 total (51% ad share). (6) TripAdvisor: no new email in 24h — no ad performance report. (7) Reservations: 2 today (Thu May 14, Bettina Stephan 7pm 2g), 3 tomorrow (Fri May 15, Stephen McCandlish 7pm 3g). (8) GitHub PAT: 200 OK.
